parts.text: I just prayed. Coach me briefly.

Assalamu Alaikum! 🕌

Alhamdulillah that you've completed your prayer! May Allah accept it from you. 🤲

It's wonderful that you're maintaining your worship during Ramadan. Based on your schedule:

- Your next prayer is Maghrib at 18:38 UTC (around 19:38 local time in Casablanca)
- Isha follows at 19:51 UTC (around 20:51 local time)

Your weekly consistency is at 47.5% - with Ramadan being a special month, this is a great opportunity to increase your regularity. Perhaps after Maghrib, you could consider adding some evening adhkar to strengthen your connection with Allah.

Keep up the good work, and may Allah make your prayers easy and accept them from you. 🌙✨
